item.title: San Francisco Teachers End Strike After 4 Days
item.description: Public schools are expected to reopen on Wednesday for 50,000 students in the city. Teachers demanded higher wages and health care benefits.

item.title: Venezuela’s Natural Gas, Not Oil, Might Be a Big Early Prize
item.description: The South American country has natural gas that could be extracted and exported quickly, but U.S. sanctions, which are now being eased, have stymied d...

item.title: Mamdani Revives Bus and Bike Lanes Killed by Adams in ‘Backroom Deals’
item.description: A range of new projects announced on Friday will reverse decisions made by the Adams administration and help the new mayor fulfill his vow to speed up...

item.title: Au Pair Juliana Peres Magalhães Sentenced to 10 Years in Banfield Double Murder Case

item.title: The Infrastructure of Jeffrey Epstein’s Power
item.description: The journalist Anand Giridharadas examines the power and influence that Jeffrey Epstein brokered and that the latest batch of Epstein files puts on di...
